description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ghcr.io/maxking/mailman-ci-runner:latest Docker image, includes the SAST.gitlab-ci.yml template, sets the variable SAST_DEFAULT_ANALYZERS to bandit,secrets, and defines the stages quality-assurance and test. In the quality-assurance stage add a docs job that runs `tox -e docs`, a lint-js job that uses the node:latest image and runs `npm install -g eslint@"<9.0"` followed by `eslint -c .eslintrc.yml hyperkitty/static/hyperkitty/js`, and a qa job that runs `tox -e qa`. In the test stage add a coverage job that runs `tox -e py312-django42-cov`. Also in the test stage add a test-django42 job that runs in parallel for PYTHON_VER values 39, 310, 311, and 312 executing `tox -e "py$PYTHON_VER-django42"`. Finally, add a test-django52 job that runs in parallel for PYTHON_VER values 310, 311, 312, and 313 executing `tox -e "py$PYTHON_VER-django52"`.
